### Legend

| Sub-column | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| ADR | Architecture Decision Record declares this contract |
| Helper | Helper utility implementing the contract exists |
| Proactive | Codegen/builder enforcer makes violations impossible |
| Reactive | Lint/test enforcer catches violations after the fact |
